description: Core data model and branded ID types — the type foundation for the entire app
All constraints, half-bin helpers, defaults, and ID generators
Result type public API — constructors, type guards, error types, utilities
Domain error types (LayoutError, ValidationError, StorageError, ApiError) and error codes
Storage public facade — atomic operations, layout CRUD, library management
Primary store: layout mutations returning Result types, bin/layer/category operations
